heading: Queries
body:
If you have not done so already, complete the following to run the following queries successfully:

- [Load Sample Data Into Atlas](sample-data) into the Atlas cluster you're using as a data source for your federated database instance.

- [Use the Feed Downstream Systems Wizard](feed-downstream-systems) to extract data from you Atlas cluster into your AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) bucket.
